---
title: "Notes on the Synthesis of Form"
author: "Christopher Alexander"
description: "Proposing a method to decompose complex problems into a logical, hierarchical structure"
categories: [data based, systems, composition, assignment]
date-format: "YYYY"
date: "1964"
fig-cap-location: bottom
---
![placeholder for the image](../../images/gordon_cullen.jpg){#fig-concise-townscape fig-align="center"}


placeholder for the text


## Why use this method? 


## How does it work?


## You are ready to use this method if


## Questions you can answer 


## Steps


## Tools {#tools}


## Cases


## References


## Exercises
